context: Refunds: customers may request a full refund within 14 days of purchase. After 14 days the subscription is non-refundable.
reference: You can request a full refund within 14 days of purchase; after that it is non-refundable.

input: How much storage does the Free plan include?
context: Free plan: 5 GB storage, 1 seat, community support.
reference: The Free plan includes 5 GB of storage.

input: How much does the Pro plan cost?
context: Pro plan: $20 per month, 100 GB storage, priority email support.
reference: The Pro plan costs $20 per month.

input: How many seats does the Team plan support?
context: Team plan: up to 10 seats, 1 TB pooled storage, SSO.
reference: The Team plan supports up to 10 seats.

context: Data residency: all customer data is stored in the EU (Frankfurt) region.
reference: Your data is stored in the EU (Frankfurt) region.

input: I forgot my password, can you help me reset it?
context: Password resets are handled by sending a secure reset link to the account email via the reset_password tool.
reference: I've sent a reset link to your email. Please check your inbox.
